storyboard.concept: J is a pointwise square root of -I that turns symplectic area into a metric
storyboard.inspection_target: positive area values and the metric ellipse
storyboard.validation: J^2=-I, compatibility defect zero, positive sampled taming

storyboard.concept: dbar_J is the local error signal for being a J-curve
storyboard.inspection_target: dark holomorphic panel versus bright conjugate perturbation
storyboard.validation: perturbed residual is much larger than holomorphic residual

storyboard.concept: finite order contacts have finite slopes; infinite-order contact is rigid
storyboard.validation: fitted slopes equal the declared orders

storyboard.concept: z^2 has an isolated critical point and generic two-point fibers
storyboard.validation: fiber count and branch zero count

storyboard.concept: local elliptic facts feed simple-curve structure and adjunction
storyboard.inspection_target: directed path from dbar equation to adjunction
storyboard.validation: directed acyclic graph with required terminal nodes

storyboard.concept: genus and double points are bounded by class data in CP2
storyboard.validation: all integer examples satisfy the inequality
